tool.name: WebAtlas Process Spatial datasets
tool.command: #if $input_type.input_type_selector == 'h5ad': ln -s '$input_h5ad' input.h5ad && process_h5ad.py --path input.h5ad --stem $stem @H5AD_TO_ZARR_COMMAND_BLOCK@ mkdir -p '$output_zarr.extra_files_path' && mv $stem-anndata.zarr '$output_zarr.extra_files_path' #else if $input_type.input_type_selector == 'spaceranger': mkdir unpacked_spaceranger && unzip $input_spaceranger -d unpacked_spaceranger && process_spaceranger.py --path unpacked_spaceranger --stem $stem #if not $load_clusters: --load_clusters=False #end if #if not $load_embeddings: --load_embeddings=False #end if #if $load_raw: --load_raw #end if #if $save_h5ad: --save_h5ad #end if @H5AD_TO_ZARR_COMMAND_BLOCK@ #if $save_h5ad: mv tmp-'$stem'.h5ad $output_h5ad && #end if mkdir -p '$output_zarr.extra_files_path' && mv $stem-anndata.zarr '$output_zarr.extra_files_path' #else if $input_type.input_type_selector == 'xenium': mkdir unpacked_xenium && unzip $input_xenium -d unpacked_xenium && process_xenium.py --path unpacked_xenium --stem $stem #if not $spatial_as_pixel: --spatial_as_pixel=False #end if #if $resolution: --resolution $resolution #end if #if $save_h5ad: --save_h5ad #end if @H5AD_TO_ZARR_COMMAND_BLOCK@ #if $save_h5ad: mv tmp-'$stem'.h5ad $output_h5ad && #end if mkdir -p '$output_zarr.extra_files_path' && mv $stem-anndata.zarr '$output_zarr.extra_files_path' #else if $input_type.input_type_selector == 'merscope': mkdir unpacked_merscope && unzip $input_merscope -d unpacked_merscope && process_merscope.py --path unpacked_merscope --stem $stem --filter_prefix $filter_prefix #if $save_h5ad: --save_h5ad #end if @H5AD_TO_ZARR_COMMAND_BLOCK@ #if $save_h5ad: mv tmp-'$stem'.h5ad $output_h5ad && #end if mkdir -p '$output_zarr.extra_files_path' && mv $stem-anndata.zarr '$output_zarr.extra_files_path' ## #else if $input_type.input_type_selector == 'molecules': ## process_molecules.py --path $input_molecules --stem $stem --has_header $has_header --gene_col_name $gene_col_name --x_col_name $x_col_name --y_col_name $y_col_name --delimiter $delimiter --x_scale $x_scale --y_scale $y_scale --x_offset $x_offset --y_offset $y_offset --gene_col_idx $gene_col_idx --x_col_idx $x_col_idx --y_col_idx $y_col_idx --filter_col_name $filter_col_name --filter_col_idx $filter_col_idx --filter_col_value $filter_col_value && ## mv '$stem'*.json $output_json #end if

param.name: input_type_selector
param.label: Choose the type of input data
param.help: Choose the format of the input dataset to process into AnnData-Zarr.

param.label: Include cluster files
param.help: If cluster files should be included in the AnnData object.

param.label: Include embeddings
param.help: If embedding coordinates files should be included in the AnnData object.

param.label: Use raw matrix count file
param.help: If the raw matrix count file should be loaded instead of the filtered matrix.

param.label: Convert spatial coordinates to pixel coordinates
param.help: Convert Xenium spatial coordinates to pixel coordinates using the specified resolution.

param.label: Pixel resolution
param.help: Pixel resolution to use for converting spatial coordinates to pixel coordinates. Default value: 0.2125

param.label: Filter prefix
param.help: Prefix to filter out of the data. Default value: 'Blank-'.

tool.help:
This tool converts supported spatial omics data formats into an AnnData object and subsequently into the Zarr format. It is used to standardize spatial omics data formats, ensuring compatibility with downstream visualization.
----
**Supported Input Types**
- **AnnData file (H5AD)** - **SpaceRanger output archive (ZIP)** - **Xenium output archive (ZIP)** - **MERSCOPE output archive (ZIP)**
----
**Processing Steps**
Regardless of input type, the following steps are performed:
- Conversion to AnnData (if input is not already AnnData) - Standardization of data types and structure - Optional preprocessing (e.g. subsetting, embeddings) - Conversion to Zarr format
----
**Parameters**
- **Output Zarr column chunk size** Defines how many variables (e.g. genes) are stored per chunk in the Zarr representation of the expression matrix. A single chunk contains all observations (e.g. cells) and the specified amount of variables. Smaller chunks can lead to more efficient data retrieval in downstream analysis and visualization when accessing a small number of variables. Larger chunks may improve writing speed to the Zarr format and improve performance when accessing larger portions of the dataset at the same time.
- **Compute embeddings** If enabled, PCA and UMAP embeddings are computed from the AnnData object if they are not already present. These embeddings are usually required for downstream visualization.
- **Alternative var index** Specifies an alternative column in the *var* table to be used as the primary feature index. This allows the use of specific identifiers, such as gene names, when the default index does not contain the desired values.
- **Batch processing and batch size** Enables incremental processing of the AnnData into Zarr in batches defined by batch size. This prevents loading the full dataset into memory at once, making it useful for large datasets. This is a trade-off between memory usage and runtime. It does not change the structure of the final Zarr output.
- **Subset AnnData on an obs column** Allows filtering of observations based on a specified column in the *obs* table. Only observations matching the specified values are kept in the dataset.
- **Subset AnnData on a var column** Allows filtering of variables based on a specified column in the *var* table (e.g. gene_ids). Only variables matching the specified values (e.g. A1CF, MSN) are kept in the dataset.
- **Consolidate metadata** Whether the Zarr metadata is consolidated, which can improve read performance by reducing the amount of metadata files that need to be accessed. Disabling this is usually only useful if specific metadata entries wish to be modified. Only disable this if you have a specific use in mind.
----
**Input type specific parameters**
- **SpaceRanger**
- Include clustering files: Whether cluster files from the SpaceRanger data are included in the AnnData object. - Include embeddings: Whether embeddings (e.g. PCA, UMAP) from the SpaceRanger data are included in the AnnData object. - Use raw matrix count file: Loads the raw matrix count file instead of the filtered matrix file.
- **Xenium**
- Convert spatial coordinates to pixel coordinates: Convert Xenium spatial coordinates to pixel coordinates using the specified pixel resolution. - Pixel resolution: Pixel resolution used for converting Xenium spatial coordinates to pixel coordinates.
- **MERSCOPE**
- Filter prefix: Prefix to filter out of the MERSCOPE data.
----
**Output**
- **AnnData Zarr dataset**
The output is used as input for the downstream WebAtlas tools **WebAtlas Build Vitessce Config** and **WebAtlas Write**.
